pages.raw_text:
Once there giant who lived in a called Cor
poratlon and he was very big and fierce and always hun
cry Nobody could tell how many men, women and chill
dren he ate up every day. because he very shy and
kept his doings to himself


Now, this Giant because he afraid of all the people
and what they could do BY AGING TOGETHER, and
because he wanted to appear to be innocent good thing
for the country in which he lived and which kept him fat
and prosperous styshy parted his in the middle
and called himself A. Infant Industry. But time went
of the people began to say that this Giant who
took their homes their Clothes their lives and everything
else was no Infant and SO they began calling him Adam
Trust.


Well, you may be that just part of the
people began calling things by their right whole
lot of them went to thinking and looking into things
and shortly they organized resolved that they would
no longer pay such heavy tribute to Adam Trust in lives
wages and other things


Indeed this stirred Adam Trust greatly and he roared
and whined grevously. But it in vain. If you
going to get all raise, said the people, won't raise
things; well quit work


My! What blow that to the Giant! But he was


very sly and cunning old Giant have already said
and so he took the matter TO THE HIGH PRIESTS of
the law, who held forth in place called the Supreme
Court And the high priests issued what they called
Injunction forblddng part OF the people interfering
with A. Infant Industrys living people and their
things.


People always get mad when told that they shall not
do this that and these enoned people boldly said
that the Giant Infant but simply Adam Trust and
he shouldn't longer live off people. Whereupon the high
priests of the law put into jail number of the leaders of
the people FOR THEIR CONTEMPT of what the high
priests had said.


Now tins country OF our story was supposed to be gov
emed under what they called Constitution and the peo
pie not yet in jail quoted to the high priests this:


Amendment VI: In all criminal prosecutions the
cused shall enjoy the right speedy and public trial by
impartial jury etc, etc.


The people thought they had the Giant and the high
priests there but the high priests said:


''Tle Constitution doesn't what it says. Con
tempt is crime against us: We make it so. We are
PROSECUTOR JUDGE AND JURY Jail for you'll!


You may well believe that this startled the people, So
they went to thinking again, and Of them decided
that if the Constitution out, THEY WOULD
MAKE A NEW ONE that would say what it meant and
mean what it said and not leave the final say to high
priests, friends of the Giant


The story ends here, but maybe give you the
sequel later on
